_comment: EXAMS APP - Exam Package Import Example
_IMPORTANT: This imports to the EXAMS app (exams.Exam model) - for exam preparation packages
_NOTE: This creates an exam PACKAGE (e.g., JAMB 2026) with multiple subject courses
title: JAMB UTME 2026 Preparation
description:
Complete preparation package for the 2026 JAMB Unified Tertiary Matriculation Examination.

📚 Package Includes:
- All 4 JAMB subjects
- Video lessons for every topic
- Practice questions from past JAMB exams
- Mock exams with timing
- Performance analytics

🎯 Exam Details:
- Total: 400 marks (100 per subject)
- Duration: 3 hours
- Format: Multiple choice
- Exam Date: May 15, 2026
short_description: Complete JAMB UTME 2026 preparation with all subjects, practice questions, and mock exams
exam_format:
Computer-Based Test (CBT) with 4 subjects:
1. Use of English (100 marks)
2. Mathematics (100 marks)
3. Physics (100 marks)
4. Chemistry (100 marks)

Each subject has 40 questions @ 2.5 marks each
_comment_instructor: Optional - will default to current user if not provided
requirements:
- Completed secondary school (O-Level)
- Valid JAMB registration
- Basic computer skills for CBT
- Internet connection for online practice
learning_outcomes:
✓ Master all JAMB UTME syllabus topics
✓ Practice with 500+ past JAMB questions
✓ Complete 10+ full mock exams
✓ Score 250+ in JAMB UTME
✓ Understand exam strategies and time management
target_audience: O-Level graduates seeking university admission in Nigeria

sections.title: What to Expect in JAMB English
sections.text_content:
# JAMB Use of English - Comprehension Section

## Exam Format:
- **40 questions** in 45 minutes
- **Sections**: Comprehension, Grammar, Vocabulary
- **Comprehension**: 3-4 passages with 10-15 questions

## Question Types:
1. **Main Idea**: What is the passage mainly about?
2. **Details**: Specific information from the text
3. **Inference**: What can be concluded?
4. **Vocabulary**: Meaning of words in context
5. **Author's Purpose**: Why did the author write this?

## Time Management:
- Read passage: 2-3 minutes
- Answer questions: 1 minute per question
- Review: 2 minutes

## Scoring Strategy:
- Each question = 2.5 marks
- No negative marking
- Attempt all questions

lessons._comment_resources: ExamResource - resources attached to this lesson (NOT to sections!)

sections.title: Sample Passage: Education in Nigeria
sections.text_content:
**Read the passage below and answer the questions that follow:**

Education has long been recognized as a fundamental human right and a key driver of social and economic development. In Nigeria, the education system has undergone significant transformations since independence, with efforts to increase access, improve quality, and align curricula with national development goals...

[Full passage would be included here]

sections.title: Practice Questions
sections.text_content: Answer the following questions based on the passage above

sections.title: JAMB Mathematics Overview
sections.text_content:
# JAMB Mathematics Preparation

## Exam Structure:
- **40 questions** in 45 minutes
- **Coverage**: Algebra, Geometry, Trigonometry, Calculus
- **Calculator**: Scientific calculator allowed

## Topic Distribution:
1. Number & Numeration (5-7 questions)
2. Algebra (10-12 questions)
3. Geometry & Mensuration (8-10 questions)
4. Trigonometry (6-8 questions)
5. Calculus (4-6 questions)

## Scoring Tips:
- Show working in draft (helps you think)
- Check units in your answer
- Verify answers make sense
- Practice mental math for speed

mock_exams._comment: MockExam - Full practice test with questions
mock_exams.title: Mock Test 1: Diagnostic Assessment
mock_exams.description: Complete diagnostic test covering all 4 subjects to assess your current level and identify areas for improvement
mock_exams.instructions:
📋 INSTRUCTIONS:

1. This is a FULL mock exam (160 questions, 3 hours)
2. You have 3 attempts to take this test
3. Answer ALL questions - no negative marking
4. Use the on-screen timer to manage your time
5. You can review your answers after submission

⏱️ TIME ALLOCATION:
- English: 45 minutes (40 questions)
- Mathematics: 45 minutes (40 questions)
- Physics: 45 minutes (40 questions)
- Chemistry: 45 minutes (40 questions)

Good luck! 🍀
mock_exams._comment_questions: MockExamQuestion - Questions in this mock exam
mock_exams._question_fields: MockExamQuestion: question_text, question_type, order, options, correct_answer, explanation, marks, difficulty, course_code (to link to subject)

questions.question_text: In the sentence 'Neither the students nor the teacher was present', which word makes the sentence grammatically correct?
questions.explanation: When subjects are joined by 'neither...nor', the verb agrees with the subject closest to it. Since 'teacher' (singular) is closest to the verb, we use 'was' (singular). Rule: Neither X nor Y = verb agrees with Y.

questions.question_text: If 2x + 3 = 11, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
Solving: 2x + 3 = 11
Subtract 3 from both sides: 2x = 8
Divide by 2: x = 4

Verification: 2(4) + 3 = 8 + 3 = 11 ✓

questions._comment: Add more questions here - typically 40 per subject = 160 total
questions.question_text: What is the value of π (pi) to 2 decimal places?
questions.explanation: π (pi) ≈ 3.14159... which rounds to 3.14 to 2 decimal places. This is a fundamental constant in mathematics representing the ratio of a circle's circumference to its diameter.

mock_exams.title: Mock Test 2: Advanced Practice

⚠️ ADVANCED MOCK EXAM

This test contains harder questions to challenge you. Passing mark is 250/400 (62.5%).

Recommended for students who have:
✓ Completed all course modules
✓ Scored 70%+ on Mock Test 1
✓ Practiced with past papers

Good luck! 💪

questions._comment: Include advanced questions here - structure same as above
questions.question_text: If log₁₀(x) = 2, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation:
log₁₀(x) = 2 means 10² = x
Therefore x = 100

Remember: log_b(x) = y means b^y = x
